ValidationRule.description: When Mailing Country indicates United States, Email and Phone are required.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( MailingCountry = "US", MailingCountry = "USA", MailingCountry = "United States" ), OR( ISBLANK(Email), ISBLANK(Phone) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When Country is US, Email and Phone are required.
